JUDICIAL MEDIATION
Off Calendar Apr-09-2024 Continued To May-10-24 At 01:00 P.M. In Dept 305

Notice Of A Motion To Compel Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Nov-14-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Megan Ryan; Deputy City Attorney; 415-554-3970; appearing as counsel for plaintiffs City and County of San Francisco and People of the State of California.
Justin A. Goodman; Zacks & Freedman, PC; 415-956-8100; appearing as counsel for defendnats 320 Alemany LLC and Jack Tseng.

Plaintiffs contest the court's tentative ruling. The parties' joint proposed protective order is discussed. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES is granted, subject to protective order. Defendant to provide responses within 20 days of notice of entry of order granting this motion, subject to protective order.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2023 Set For Trial On May-28-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of A Motion To Compel Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Oct-19-2023 Continued To Nov-14-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Megan E. Ryan, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3970, Email: megan.ryan@sfcityatty.org, for Plaintiffs City and County of San Francisco and The People of the State of California;
Justin A. Goodman, Esq. of Zacks Freedman PC, Tel. 415.288.9755, Email: justin@zpflaw.com, for Defendant 320 Alemany LLC.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S, Motion To Compel Discovery Responses.

Plaintiffs DO NOT stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge.

Argument is held.

At the conclusion of argument, the motion is continued to November 14, 2023, at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 501, on the Real Property/Housing Court calendar.

Judge Pro Tem William Lynn is to prepare a report and recommendation.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Not Present. Matter not reported. (JPT/302)
